🧠 Model's top pick. Top-rated in the field (RPR 115, TS 99); on an improving trajectory; going conditions are ideal; good course record, in-form trainer (Simon & Ed Crisford), top jockey booked.

        "fair_odds": "7.10",

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Probably had a bit more in hand than the neck margin suggests in Listed grade at Ayr (6f, soft) to take form figures to 211; leading player on the figures upped further in distance and could well show additional progress to boot."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

      },

      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "300,000euros breeze-up purchase who, despite taking a good hold, ran on well for an emphatic 5l success at Southwell (6f, AW) in sole 2yo start; the form has received a few boosts; bred to be suited by this extra furlong and may settle better with hood now applied; brings potential."
      },
      {

        "spotlight": "Fighting fit, having beaten Ellusive Butterfly by a neck at Kempton (1m) on AW/seasonal debut; however, now worse off with that rival and balance of form suggests she's unlikely to follow up in this field."

      {

        "cd": "",

        "spotlight": "Gained her novice win at Ascot (6f) then showed Group form that comprised a close second at Newmarket (7f) and fourth of five at Longchamp (1m); holds a respectable chance on bare ratings in first-time hood."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,

        "spotlight": "Has switched to AW this year, making all in 7f maiden at Southwell then neck second to Spinning Lizzie (who received 4lb) in 1m conditions race at Kempton; faces a stiffer task back on turf."
      },
      {

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Strong 6f form in October when last seen, gaining her comfortable maiden win at the chief expense of a subsequent scorer (Zooming) then running well in Listed grade at Newmarket where she was only one place behind Azleet who landed the Nell Gwyn on Wednesday; worth another crack at 7f and probably has a better chance than bare ratings suggest."

  {
    "course": "Newbury",
    "time": "14:00",
    "race_name": "Watership Down Stud Too Darn Hot Greenham Stakes (Group 3) (Colts & Geldings)",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "7f",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 1",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Albert Einstein",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "A P O'Brien",
        "ts": "101",
        "rpr": "117",
        "or": "109",
        "form": "11-6",
        "sire": "Wootton Bassett",
        "dam_sire": "War Front",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "67.5",
        "model_pct": "25.0%",
        "fair_odds": "3.99",
        "best_dec": "3.25",
        "edge": "-11.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Rare runner in the Greenham for his powerful connections, who are still working out whether the highly regarded colt is a Guineas prospect or needs a return to 6f over which he was 2-2 as a 2yo (both on good ground); only sixth when favourite for Curragh Listed race (7f, soft to heavy; took a good hold) on return from ten-month absence but retains potential and could well take a big step forward, as well as settle better, in first-time hood with the outing under his belt; adds great interest to this field."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Title Role (GB)",
        "jockey": "James Doyle",
        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "112",
        "rpr": "116",
        "or": "106",
        "form": "21-311",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Lemon Drop Kid",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "67.3",
        "model_pct": "24.6%",
        "fair_odds": "4.07",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+7.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has shown further improvement at Meydan this year and landed the Jumeirah 2,000 Guineas (1m, good; Listed) by 1l most recently, taking overall record to 3-5; the form received a boost of sorts at Newmarket this week; sole Newbury effort, namely close second in strong maiden (6f) last May, has worked out very well; solid claims."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Zavateri (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "Eve Johnson Houghton",
        "ts": "115",
        "rpr": "128",
        "or": "118",
        "form": "11114-",
        "sire": "Without Parole",
        "dam_sire": "Siyouni",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "64.8",
        "model_pct": "16.4%",
        "fair_odds": "6.08",
        "best_dec": "3.00",
        "edge": "-17.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Cracking purchase at 35,000gns as a yearling, and developed into a smart colt during a 2025 season that featured wins in three major 2yo races, notably the National Stakes at the Curragh (7f, yielding) where his gameness was confirmed; handled the July course at Newmarket in the summer but proved all at sea on the Rowley Mile in the Dewhurst, losing his unbeaten record (still ran respectably in fourth place); he's the pick on form and launches 3yo campaign in a race that his trainer's father Fulke won twice."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Ardisia (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Hugo Palmer",
        "ts": "112",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "108",
        "form": "31127-",
        "sire": "Ardad",
        "dam_sire": "Tamayuz",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "62.4",
        "model_pct": "11.4%",
        "fair_odds": "8.76",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+6.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bargain buy at \u00a333,000 as a yearling, and picked up almost \u00a3300k in prize-money during a busy 2025 campaign, including when landing the Two Year Old Trophy at Redcar (6f); ran respectably, amid trouble, upped to 1m at the Breeders' Cup; not certain to progress any further, however."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Gonna Fly (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Rossa Ryan",
        "trainer": "Ralph Beckett",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "107",
        "or": "-",
        "form": "1-",
        "sire": "Starspangledbanner",
        "dam_sire": "Giant's Causeway",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "60.6",
        "model_pct": "8.5%",
        "fair_odds": "11.71",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Scored quite tidily at Newbury (1m, soft) in sole 2yo start; perhaps not crying out for this drop in trip, especially if the ground isn't so slow, and it should be noted that all of his future major entries are over middle distances; otherwise brings potential to Group level."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,

        "ts": "-",

        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Turf debutant who brings a solid AW record that comprises a couple of second-places at Kempton and reappearance success (admittedly faced straightforward task) at Southwell, all over 7f; unexposed but faces a much stiffer assignment upped in class, as ratings reflect."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,

        "fair_odds": "21.93",

        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Edged ahead inside the final half-furlong and did just enough at Newbury (6.5f, soft) on the same day that Gonna Fly won in better style over 1m; holds a 2,000 Guineas entry, unlike that rival, and is open to progress; bottom of this pack on bare figures as things stand, however."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Alparslan (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "K R Burke",
        "ts": "111",
        "rpr": "118",
        "or": "108",
        "form": "116-",
        "sire": "Dandy Man",
        "dam_sire": "Toronado",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "56.4",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.31",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-7.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Comfortably justified favouritism in Curragh sales race (6.3f, yielding) to follow up his debut win; rank outsider in the Dewhurst (7f, good to firm) but ran well on bare figures to finish sixth of nine, just under 2l behind Zavateri; difficult to rule out further improvement this year."
      }
    ]
  },

      {
        "rank": 1,

        "edge": "-4.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Pipped in the Deutsches Derby (1m4f) last July before landing a 1m4f Group 3 at Leopardstown and 1m3f Group 2 at Longchamp; flopped on soft ground on final start but he should not face that here and, despite giving weight all round, could be on the premises if resuming on song."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Lion's Pride (GB)",

        "fair_odds": "5.25",
        "best_dec": "4.50",
        "edge": "-4.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not discredited in Qatar in February on latest outing and in the mix judged on peak efforts, including a Newmarket Listed win (1m4f) last September; however, there are also plenty of lesser shows to be considered."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Phantom Flight (GB)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "George Scott",
        "ts": "109",
        "rpr": "124",
        "or": "112",
        "form": "71-191",
        "sire": "Siyouni",
        "dam_sire": "Encosta De Lago",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "66.1",
        "model_pct": "16.7%",
        "fair_odds": "5.98",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Four Listed wins before he added a 1m4f Group 3 success in Bahrain 15 days ago; stacks of smart form in his lengthy career and none of it better than that latest start, but a bit extra will be needed to win this."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Bellum Justum (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Andrew Balding",
        "ts": "101",
        "rpr": "127",
        "or": "108",
        "form": "/5169-",
        "sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "dam_sire": "Oasis Dream",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "64.1",
        "model_pct": "11.6%",
        "fair_odds": "8.63",
        "best_dec": "12.00",
        "edge": "+3.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won Group 2 at Newmarket (1m4f, good) last May in first-time cheekpieces, which were kept for two modest efforts in June but not today; first run since a gelding operation in September; ring-rusty on his 2025 reappearance in this race and the market may reveal whether the same is expected this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Al Aasy (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "113",
        "rpr": "131",
        "or": "115",
        "form": "47159-",

        "dam_sire": "Shamardal",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "64.0",
        "model_pct": "11.3%",
        "fair_odds": "8.88",
        "best_dec": "4.00",
        "edge": "-13.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Held up; eight Group 3 wins are already in the bag, including this race in 2021 (his only appearance in it); has a slightly mixed reappearance record but he was almost as good as ever with his two wins last term, including first time out, and a return to that level would make this 9yo the one to beat."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Tenability (GB)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "William Haggas",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "120",
        "or": "103",
        "form": "11112-",

        "dam_sire": "Pivotal",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.8",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "19.86",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a novice and three Ascot 1m4f handicaps on varied ground last June-September; creditable second of five in Ascot Group 3 on final outing; none of that form is near what should be required to win this race but he brings potential starting this second season."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He has improved with each of his four starts, getting off the mark in good style at Wolverhampton ten weeks ago (6f); while that isn't the most solid piece of form, he isn't being overfaced for his handicap debut and remains capable of further progress."
      },

        "rank": 2,

        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three times as a 2yo for Richard Fahey; ran well for a close third at Newcastle on his final run for that stable last October (6f; visored); low-key stable debut at Doncaster three weeks ago; visor absent once again."
      },
      {

        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran on well to win a 5f handicap at Newcastle in January; not quite so good back there six days later but he is feasibly weighted and 6f on good ground no problem; stable operating at a fine strike-rate in 2026."
      },
      {

        "trainer": "Philip Kirby",

        "rpr": "83",

        "fair_odds": "14.29",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two of his four wins have come over C&D; signs he was ready to exploit his reduced mark when fourth of nine at Newcastle three weeks ago; not discounted."

  {
    "course": "Newbury",
    "time": "15:10",
    "race_name": "Win Unique Experiences At OLBG Prizes Spring Cup Handicap",
    "type": "flat",
    "surface": "Turf",
    "dist": "1m",
    "going": "Good",
    "class": "Class 2",
    "draw_bias": "none",
    "draw_strength": 2,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,
        "horse": "Shout",
        "jockey": "Oisin Murphy",
        "trainer": "Simon & Ed Crisford",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "100",
        "form": "0714-9",
        "sire": "Advertise",
        "dam_sire": "Bated Breath",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "65.1",
        "model_pct": "8.4%",
        "fair_odds": "11.87",
        "best_dec": "8.00",
        "edge": "-4.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Raced too freely in the Lincoln and ended up shaping nicely in a never-nearer ninth; had ended 2025 on a high with a smooth success at Ascot (1m, soft) and a fine fourth in the Balmoral Handicap (good) over the same C&D; gets on really well with Oisin Murphy and he's back in the saddle today; still unexposed and now looks ready to strike."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "Fifth Column (IRE)",
        "jockey": "William Buick",
        "trainer": "John & Thady Gosden",
        "ts": "100",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "15100-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Singspiel",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "63.9",
        "model_pct": "7.6%",
        "fair_odds": "13.16",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Below par on his last two 3yo starts but he'd previously won competitive 1m events at Newmarket and York (both good to firm) in the summer, and he did well to prevail at York after having to wait for a run; only 3lb higher here and he'll be a major player if ready to roll after six months off."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Tony Montana (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Egan",
        "trainer": "Kevin Philippart De Foy",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "00920-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Lemon Drop Kid",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "60.8",
        "model_pct": "5.8%",
        "fair_odds": "17.23",
        "best_dec": "26.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "In and out last season for Michael Bell, the high points coming when second in big fields at York (good to firm) in May and the Curragh (good to yielding) in September; all his best efforts have come over 1m2f so today's shorter distance is a concern but it's possible he'll be freshened up by a change of stable (same owner)."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Back In Black (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "James Fanshawe",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "15324-",
        "sire": "Dark Angel",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Stars",
        "stall": 7,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "60.6",
        "model_pct": "5.7%",
        "fair_odds": "17.44",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly raced 4yo; consistent last season, winning in cosy fashion at this meeting (7f, good) and going down narrowly when stepped up in trip at Goodwood (1m, good) in the autumn; reappears having been gelded and with his stable in form; interesting contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Linwood (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Jamie Spencer",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "101",
        "rpr": "112",

        "stall": 20,

        "score": "60.0",
        "model_pct": "5.4%",
        "fair_odds": "18.41",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has a progressive profile and made it three wins from eight attempts when easily making all at Newmarket (1m, good to soft) last November; subsequently gelded; a 10lb rise means he'll need another personal best but he's a low-mileage 4yo who may have more in the tank."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Rogue Diplomat",

        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "97",
        "rpr": "114",

        "dam_sire": "Galileo",
        "stall": 14,

        "fair_odds": "18.52",
        "best_dec": "9.00",
        "edge": "-4.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Progressive 4yo; 5-6 over 7f but showed he's just as effective at 1m when making Urban Lion pull out all the stops in the Lincoln at Doncaster (good to soft) three weeks ago; 1lb better off for a nose defeat and there should be little between the pair again."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Classic (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sean Levey",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "112",

        "stall": 9,

        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.42",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Chased home Ebt's Guard and Urban Lion in this race last year and he's better off at the weights with both; ran a cracker when dropped to 7f for valuable event at Ascot last summer; hasn't been seen for eight months but he'll be dangerous if cherry ripe."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Oliver Show (IRE)",

        "ts": "94",
        "rpr": "116",

        "score": "56.6",
        "model_pct": "4.1%",
        "fair_odds": "24.57",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Showed his effectiveness over a straight 1m when beaten a nose in the 2025 Lincoln at Doncaster (good to soft) and he's now 3lb lower; several respectable efforts afterwards, and 6f on good ground was probably too sharp on his sole outing in Bahrain over the winter; certainly well handicapped on best form and well worth a market check after 106 days off."
      },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has run only five times and he signed off for last season with a personal best when second of 15 over C&D (good to soft) in September; has been gelded and makes his reappearance with his potential still intact; one of four runners for Richard Hannon."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Goes well in a big field over a straight 1m; beaten a neck in this race last year (good ground) and made a winning return in the Lincoln at Doncaster (good to soft; beat Rogue Diplomat a nose) three weeks ago; should be in the thick of things again off a 4lb higher mark."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Pretty consistent in Listed/Group races in 2025 without performing to his very best; losing sequence now stands at 18 and he reappears after seven months off in his first handicap since July 2022; cheekpieces left off and others preferred."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Whip Cracker",
        "jockey": "Ryan Moore",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "102",
        "rpr": "115",
        "or": "94",
        "form": "0220-0",
        "sire": "Cracksman",
        "dam_sire": "Sea The Moon",
        "stall": 22,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "53.9",
        "model_pct": "3.2%",
        "fair_odds": "31.18",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "On a 14-race losing sequence but he was runner-up three times last term, including when beaten a head at Glorious Goodwood (1m1f, good); went off third favourite in a big field at the Curragh on reappearance but didn't give his running; on a retrieval mission with Ryan Moore booked."
      },
      {
        "rank": 17,
        "horse": "Samuel Colt (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "Amanda Perrett",
        "ts": "92",
        "rpr": "110",
        "or": "92",
        "form": "39/05-",
        "sire": "No Nay Never",
        "dam_sire": "Duke Of Marmalade",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "53.3",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "32.89",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Very lightly raced 5yo; Group-placed in 2024 for Aidan O'Brien; has failed to beat a rival in three runs for current stable, always behind after stumbling early on at Sandown (behind Urban Lion) last June; hard to recommend on recent form but he has been dropped a chunk in the weights and gelded, and he now reappears in a hood."
      },
      {
        "rank": 18,
        "horse": "Hot Cash (GB)",
        "jockey": "Rose Dawes(5)",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "99",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "15654-",
        "sire": "Too Darn Hot",
        "dam_sire": "Champs Elysees",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-6",
        "score": "53.0",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "33.67",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Best efforts when ridden up with the pace; form tailed off in 2025 but he's now back to the same mark as when winning at Carlisle (1m, soft; handles good) last summer; gelded since last seen; stablemate of Urban Lion."
      },
      {
        "rank": 19,
        "horse": "Boyfriend (GB)",
        "jockey": "Sam Hitchcott",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "98",
        "rpr": "114",
        "or": "87",
        "form": "21456-",
        "sire": "Twilight Son",
        "dam_sire": "Kodiac",
        "stall": 15,
        "weight": "8-8",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "2.9%",
        "fair_odds": "34.08",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Reliable last season, going close under a positive Sam Hitchcott ride over C&D (good) in May; met some trouble at Newmarket on final start; not discounted, although he'll need a career best from his current mark."
      },
      {
        "rank": 20,
        "horse": "Jimmy Speaking",
        "jockey": "Nicola Currie",
        "trainer": "Chris Dwyer",
        "ts": "105",
        "rpr": "113",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3700-1",
        "sire": "Territories",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "8-3",
        "score": "52.3",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "35.70",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Well backed and defeated 15 opponents at Doncaster (7f, good to soft; just as effective over 1m) on reappearance three weeks ago; that was convincing enough but he's up 4lb and in a much stronger race here."
      },
      {
        "rank": 21,
        "horse": "Nizam (FR)",
        "jockey": "Charles Bishop",
        "trainer": "Ian Williams",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "108",
        "or": "98",
        "form": "72156-",
        "sire": "Pinatubo",
        "dam_sire": "Kingman",
        "stall": 18,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "52.1",
        "model_pct": "2.8%",
        "fair_odds": "36.22",
        "best_dec": "67.00",
        "edge": "+2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Like Ozat, he's an ex-French gelding who was acquired by Ian Williams (for 90,000euros) in the autumn; won three times (7.5f/1m) from just nine attempts in France; doesn't have an obvious chance off this mark on British debut but he could still be unexposed."
      },
      {
        "rank": 22,
        "horse": "Al Mubhir",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "Kevin Ryan",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "111",
        "or": "102",
        "form": "03500-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.5",
        "model_pct": "2.2%",
        "fair_odds": "45.66",
        "best_dec": "41.00",
        "edge": "+1.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smart at his best for William Haggas, winning a Listed race at Sandown (1m2f, good) in July 2024; campaigned solely in Australia in 2025 and well beaten on his last two starts; potentially well handicapped back in Britain for a new yard after wind surgery, but he carries obvious risks."
      },
      {
        "rank": 23,
        "horse": "Hand Of God (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Harry Charlton",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "1/960-",
        "sire": "Churchill",
        "dam_sire": "Daylami",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "48.2",
        "model_pct": "2.0%",
        "fair_odds": "50.98",
        "best_dec": "21.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won the Golden Gates Handicap at Royal Ascot (1m2f, good to firm) in June 2024; seen only three times last season and wasn't at his best, although each run came in a highly competitive race; may need a positive ride to get away with this shorter trip on his reappearance, but the handicapper has given him a chance and he's certainly not ruled out."
      },
      {
        "rank": 24,
        "horse": "Ancient Rome (USA)",
        "jockey": "Jason Watson",
        "trainer": "Charles Hills",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "97",
        "form": "03000-",
        "sire": "War Front",
        "dam_sire": "Sadler's Wells",
        "stall": 24,
        "weight": "9-4",
        "score": "48.0",
        "model_pct": "1.9%",
        "fair_odds": "51.78",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Mostly well held last year and unplaced on five of his six starts; falling in the weights and dangerous if revived by a winter break, but his losing run goes back to September 2023 and he needs to turn over a new leaf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 25,
        "horse": "Serengeti",
        "jockey": "Rob Hornby",
        "trainer": "Mike Murphy",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "112",
        "or": "101",
        "form": "125-45",

        "stall": 25,
        "weight": "9-8",
        "score": "48.0",
        "model_pct": "1.9%",
        "fair_odds": "51.82",
        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has had several trainers in his short career to date; two 7f wins for Aidan O'Brien; not at his best on his last three outings, never dangerous at Kempton on latest (sole run for James Ferguson); probably best watched."
      },
      {
        "rank": 26,
        "horse": "Old Cock (IRE)",

        "trainer": "Antony Brittain",

        "best_dec": "51.00",
        "edge": "+1.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "4-10 for Edward Bethell, winning the Hambleton Handicap at York's Dante meeting (1m, good to firm) last spring; changed hands for 26,000gns last autumn; only 3lb higher than at York and doesn't have many miles on the clock."
      }
    ]
  },
  {
    "course": "Thirsk",
    "time": "15:23",

    "type": "flat",

    "draw_strength": 4,
    "runners": [
      {
        "rank": 1,

        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "-",

        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 7,

        "fair_odds": "6.21",
        "best_dec": "4.33",
        "edge": "-7.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Only raced four times for Charles Hills but he won a 7f novice on his debut and finished second in both handicaps in 2024; the form of the Newbury second worked out extremely well and this mark ought to be in range; a 560-day absence, during which time he has changed hands (30,000gns last July) and been gelded, is the obvious concern but he returns for a stable in red-hot form; hooded first time; betting informative."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "City Captain",
        "jockey": "Kevin Stott",
        "trainer": "Harriet Bethell",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "78",
        "form": "4931-6",
        "sire": "Aclaim",
        "dam_sire": "Elusive City",
        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-2",
        "score": "59.2",
        "model_pct": "13.2%",
        "fair_odds": "7.56",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The winner of four of his eight starts last year (6f, good or slower); perhaps needed the run on his return to action at Newcastle last month, running respectably in the smaller stands' side group; the more rain to fall the better for him."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "One Night Thunder (GB)",
        "jockey": "Kaiya Fraser",
        "trainer": "Gemma Tutty",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "82",

        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "56.9",

        "fair_odds": "9.77",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+4.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Prominent racer who enjoyed a purple patch last September, winning back-to-back Carlisle handicaps and coming up just shy in his hat-trick bid at Beverley; returns from 170 days off on a tough enough mark and others make more appeal."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Frankies Dream (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Paul Mulrennan",
        "trainer": "Jennie Candlish",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "25187-",
        "sire": "Belardo",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "55.5",
        "model_pct": "8.8%",
        "fair_odds": "11.42",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "+2.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Six wins in the first half of 2025, notably when seeing off 21 rivals at York last May; absent for nine months but Paul Mulrennan has been booked for his return (two wins and two seconds from five rides on him) and this should be run to suit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Melvin Udall",
        "jockey": "Jason Hart",
        "trainer": "Grace Harris",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "4214-1",
        "sire": "Earthlight",
        "dam_sire": "Iffraaj",
        "stall": 8,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "54.2",
        "model_pct": "7.5%",
        "fair_odds": "13.26",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-8.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lightly-raced 4yo; attracted support and made a perfect start for new connections when seeing off 14 rivals at Doncaster three weeks ago (7f, good to soft); 5lb higher in a better race but there was a lot to like about the way he responded to pressure last time; can do better."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "U Sure Do (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "85",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "83",
        "form": "12012-",
        "sire": "Kodiac",
        "dam_sire": "Tiger Hill",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-7",
        "score": "53.6",
        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "14.17",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 in a rich vein of form, winning a Catterick handicap (7f, good) before a narrow defeat at Musselburgh (7f, soft) when last seen 164 days ago; another 2lb higher on his reappearance so he will need to be cherry ripe for this return to action."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Leadman (GB)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Tudhope",
        "trainer": "David O'Meara",
        "ts": "87",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "078U6-",
        "sire": "Kingman",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 2,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "53.1",
        "model_pct": "6.7%",
        "fair_odds": "14.89",
        "best_dec": "6.00",
        "edge": "-9.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Regularly flattered to deceive for Andrew Balding; managed to put his head in front in a 7f Newmarket handicap last July (7f, good to firm) and today's 2lb higher mark not beyond him; he is the type that needs everything to fall right though and others appeal more for win purposes, for all this drop into Class 4 company will be of benefit."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Woodstock (GB)",
        "jockey": "Joanna Mason",
        "trainer": "Ruth Carr",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "28326-",
        "sire": "Sixties Icon",
        "dam_sire": "Invincible Spirit",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.32",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Failed to win in 2025 but he ran some solid races in defeat and he makes his seasonal return off a dangerous mark; interesting to see how he fares in the betting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Count Palatine (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Connor Beasley",
        "trainer": "Michael Dods",
        "ts": "91",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "82",

        "dam_sire": "Desert King",
        "stall": 9,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "52.9",
        "model_pct": "6.5%",
        "fair_odds": "15.34",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "C&D winner; two wins in the second half of 2025 and he ended that campaign with a good second of 15 at Leicester in October; runs off the same mark but he could only manage a midfield finish in this race on his reappearance 12 months ago."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Alpha Capture",
        "jockey": "Mark Winn",
        "trainer": "Roger Fell",
        "ts": "84",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "75",
        "form": "754-33",

        "dam_sire": "Vale Of York",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "8-13",
        "score": "52.4",
        "model_pct": "6.2%",
        "fair_odds": "16.12",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Smart 2yo for Wiliam Haggas; won a Killarney handicap in July 2024 when trained by Willie Mullins; two good runs for new yard this spring, third at Newcastle and Pontefract (both 1m), and likely to be in the shake up."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Beaujolais Nouveau (GB)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Ben Haslam",
        "ts": "78",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "25300-",
        "sire": "Twilight Son",
        "dam_sire": "Champs Elysees",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "49.1",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.48",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran well in the face of a stiff task in a Carlisle Listed event last summer; confirmed she hadn't been flattered there when finishing a fine third over C&D last September; two lesser efforts to round off 2025 but the form of that C&D run, where she travelled so powerfully, offers serious hope this mark is in range; has run well after a break in the past and her trainer is having a fine year; contender."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Draupnir (GB)",
        "jockey": "Billy Garritty",
        "trainer": "Michael & David Easterby",
        "ts": "67",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "72",
        "form": "28317-",
        "sire": "Golden Horn",
        "dam_sire": "Tiger Hill",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "8-10",
        "score": "48.0",
        "model_pct": "3.8%",
        "fair_odds": "26.29",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Lost his action and weakened at Catterick when last seen 199 days ago; prior to that he had comfortably seen off nine rivals in a C&D handicap (soft) in September; only had seven starts and there should be more to come."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Quest For Fun",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "79",
        "rpr": "99",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "2620-9",
        "sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "dam_sire": "Intense Focus",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "46.1",
        "model_pct": "3.0%",
        "fair_odds": "32.77",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-5.2pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He finished down the field in this race 12 months ago but he has had the benefit of a run this time around and a promising effort it was too, shuffled back at a crucial stage but keeping on close home (7f, good to soft); his record at York suggests one eye may be on next month's Dante meeting but he's more than capable off this mark."
      }
    ]
  },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Did well once cheekpieces were added last summer, winning at Ffos Las (1m, good to soft) and in the frame on four other occasions; can get it wrong at the start and that may be an issue dropping back to 7f."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,

        "edge": "+1.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Arrives in good form, winning twice at Southwell in February and finding only another thriving rival too strong in his hat-trick bid last month; only fifth of 16 back on turf at Doncaster three weeks ago (behind It'sneverjustone); perhaps too high in the weights for now."
      },

        "fair_odds": "9.20",
        "best_dec": "7.50",
        "edge": "-1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a pair of 7f handicaps at Catterick last October; returned from a 142-day absence with a fine third at Newcastle three weeks ago, doing best of the smaller stands' side group; runs off the same mark today and should make another bold bid."
      },

        "model_pct": "5.5%",
        "fair_odds": "18.11",
        "best_dec": "9.50",
        "edge": "-3.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Not on a bad mark but her low-key stable debut at Musselburgh on Sunday doesn't suggest she is the answer this time."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Green Pursuit",
        "jockey": "Dale Swift",
        "trainer": "Seb Spencer",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "96",
        "or": "74",
        "form": "4720-0",
        "sire": "Arizona",
        "dam_sire": "High Chaparral",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "8-12",
        "score": "47.9",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.55",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Began 2025 in good form, winning a handicap at Catterick and then finishing a good second at Ripon (both 6f, good); modest form in two runs back with Seb Spencer but his return to action at Doncaster three weeks ago certainly didn't get to the bottom of him, travelling well under restraint and then meeting some trouble as the race was unfolding; capable of better, perhaps markedly so, and the betting should be revealing."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "War Howl",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Ben Haslam",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "96-990",
        "sire": "Bated Breath",
        "dam_sire": "Camelot",
        "stall": 5,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "46.8",
        "model_pct": "4.5%",
        "fair_odds": "22.35",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two 7f wins for Mick Appleby last summer; back to his last winning mark but that is a result of showing little in three starts for current connections; only of interest if attracting support."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Son (GB)",
        "jockey": "David Allan",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "96",

        "form": "67067-",

        "dam_sire": "Selkirk",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "46.6",
        "model_pct": "4.4%",
        "fair_odds": "22.83",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-3.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "The winner of just one of his 16 starts for Richard Hannon but he was often highly tried; unplaced in six runs in 2025 but that resulted in his handicap mark dropping 17lb; sold for 24,000gns in October; one of two making their debut for Tim Easterby."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "Society Man",

        "dam_sire": "Zafeen",
        "stall": 11,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "46.5",
        "model_pct": "4.3%",
        "fair_odds": "23.18",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "None too consistent for current stable and his best efforts in Britain have been on AW; ideally suited by testing ground when trained in France so rain would aid his cause."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Brighton Boy (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Sean Kirrane",
        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",

        "fair_odds": "23.70",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "-1.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Promising 2yo; needed a drop into selling company, albeit a hot seller, to get off the mark in 2025 (7.6f, soft); sold out of Andrew Balding's stable for 20,000gns last October; could probably do with a few pounds off his back; has worn cheekpieces in the past but goes without today."
      }
    ]
  },

        "spotlight": "Made a winning start in handicaps at Windsor (11.5f) in September and backed it up with a solid fifth at Yarmouth (11.5f) the following month on his final run for Ed Walker; since changed hands for 32,000gns and he can't be discounted starting out for another good yard here with few miles still on the clock."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Close on good ground on both turf starts, latterly over 1m2f at the Newmarket Craven meeting last April; gelded that July and won a novice at Chelmsford (1m2f, AW; easily in the end at 1-3) in October, which makes him unexposed and promising for this seasonal and handicap debut for in-form yard."
      },

        "rpr": "98",

        "stall": 12,
        "weight": "9-0",

        "fair_odds": "7.72",
        "best_dec": "6.50",
        "edge": "-2.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "2-6 on Flat, with the second win registered over C&D (good) last August; two wins among his five hurdle races this season, including latest start, so he should be primed to run well again today."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,

        "edge": "-3.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Runner-up over about 1m2f on four of eight starts last year, including in two handicaps; close third on reappearance at Southwell (1m3f, AW) in early March but that was when 4-7 in a novice event and that disappointment heightens the concern over his lingering maiden status."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,

        "ts": "86",

        "stall": 5,

        "score": "57.2",
        "model_pct": "7.7%",
        "fair_odds": "13.02",
        "best_dec": "10.00",
        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Both wins were on AW and his turf form is not quite as good, but he's basically highly reliable and it would be no surprise if he's seriously involved for yard which won this race last year."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Arcturus Flame",
        "jockey": "Finley Marsh",
        "trainer": "Richard Hughes",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "5263-3",

        "dam_sire": "Kitten's Joy",

        "model_pct": "7.2%",
        "fair_odds": "13.81",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "+0.1pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "While a Nottingham 1m handicap last April remains his only win, he's run well over about 1m2f in three of four starts for his current yard; that gives him each-way claims and the return of headgear (tried by his previous stable and he ran well, including for the win) could be a help."

        "edge": "-3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won three in a row to kick off his 3yo and handicap careers last term; back on the up when reappearing to score at Newcastle (AW) in February, before well held (made most) in a warm 1m3f AW race at Kempton; needs to resume improvement."

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Has had just four races over his previous two seasons, with two wins; that includes at this track last June on latest start when he made all for a narrow win over 7f on handicap debut; raised just 1lb and this move up to 1m2f makes for fascinating reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,
        "horse": "Sportingsilvermine",
        "jockey": "Cieren Fallon",
        "trainer": "James Owen",
        "ts": "88",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "3227-0",
        "sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "dam_sire": "Manduro",
        "stall": 1,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "51.9",
        "model_pct": "5.1%",
        "fair_odds": "19.52",
        "best_dec": "17.00",
        "edge": "+0.8pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "His only two wins (31 races) were last spring on his first two starts for James Owen; a string of creditable efforts followed (1m2f-1m4f) and 1m6f probably didn't help when he tailed off on reappearance two weeks ago, but connections now reach for a hood; has a competitive mark but he's probably not the percentage call."
      },
      {
        "rank": 9,
        "horse": "Rathgar",
        "jockey": "Tom Marquand",
        "trainer": "Jack Channon",
        "ts": "73",
        "rpr": "97",
        "or": "85",
        "form": "2300-4",
        "sire": "Ulysses",
        "dam_sire": "Al Kazeem",
        "stall": 10,
        "weight": "9-9",
        "score": "51.7",
        "model_pct": "5.0%",
        "fair_odds": "19.89",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ran creditably over 1m2f on good ground on first three starts last season and back-to-form fourth of 13 at Kempton (AW) three weeks ago; thereabouts if the returning cheekpieces (worn on final start in 2024, below form) don't have an adverse effect."
      },
      {
        "rank": 10,
        "horse": "Without Compromise",
        "jockey": "NON-RUNNER",
        "trainer": "Antony Brittain",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "95",

        "fair_odds": "23.54",
        "best_dec": "-",
        "edge": "-",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": ""
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,
        "horse": "Morcar (GB)",
        "jockey": "Joe Leavy",
        "trainer": "Richard Hannon",
        "ts": "74",
        "rpr": "95",
        "or": "79",
        "form": "23338-",
        "sire": "Saxon Warrior",
        "dam_sire": "Dansili",
        "stall": 3,
        "weight": "9-3",
        "score": "48.5",
        "model_pct": "4.0%",
        "fair_odds": "25.28",
        "best_dec": "23.00",
        "edge": "-0.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Suited by good/firmer and has won four 1m2f handicaps, the latest last May; he seemed in need of the run when 28-1 in this race the time before, so that's a concern on today's first run since his second wind surgery."
      },
      {
        "rank": 12,
        "horse": "The Green Mile (IRE)",
        "jockey": "David Probert",
        "trainer": "Neil Mulholland",
        "ts": "46",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "137/5-",
        "sire": "Waldgeist",
        "dam_sire": "Dark Angel",
        "stall": 13,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "48.5",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.38",
        "best_dec": "34.00",
        "edge": "+1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Bright start as 2yo in 2024 but then trailed the field in a Group 3 that October and, following a 80,000gns sale, has raced only once since, when never dangerous in a 1m2f handicap last May; 343 days off before this belated fifth start and it's hard to know how much ability remains; market may guide."
      },
      {
        "rank": 13,
        "horse": "Royale Goodnight",
        "jockey": "Kieran Shoemark",
        "trainer": "Harry Charlton",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "92",
        "or": "77",
        "form": "18/2-",
        "sire": "Golden Horn",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 4,
        "weight": "9-1",
        "score": "48.2",
        "model_pct": "3.9%",
        "fair_odds": "25.78",
        "best_dec": "15.00",
        "edge": "-2.7pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won debut but well beaten in a soft-ground Listed contest on her only other start as 2yo, before wind surgery and a good second of five in 1m3f handicap at Southwell (AW) last April; that makes just three runs for the Kublers (same owners); tongue tied all starts, with a hood on final outing, and she now wears just the hood; unexposed and worth a market check."
      },
      {
        "rank": 14,
        "horse": "Something Splendid (GB)",
        "jockey": "Neil Callan",
        "trainer": "Peter Chapple-Hyam",
        "ts": "75",
        "rpr": "98",
        "or": "76",
        "form": "12104-",
        "sire": "Postponed",
        "dam_sire": "Holy Roman Emperor",
        "stall": 6,
        "weight": "9-0",
        "score": "47.2",
        "model_pct": "3.6%",
        "fair_odds": "27.92",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Clearly best form has been in three of his starts over 1m2f on ground softer than good, last July-September; not so good on last two outings and perhaps the ground won't be soft enough for today's reappearance."
      },
      {
        "rank": 15,
        "horse": "Marhaba The Champ",
        "jockey": "Clifford Lee",
        "trainer": "Sophie Leech",
        "ts": "86",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "9270-0",
        "sire": "Galileo",
        "dam_sire": "Rahy",
        "stall": 16,
        "weight": "9-6",
        "score": "46.7",
        "model_pct": "3.5%",
        "fair_odds": "29.00",
        "best_dec": "101.00",
        "edge": "+2.9pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Formerly useful on the Flat for Kevin Ryan but was sold last July and has been comfortably held since on the Flat and over hurdles; tongue-tie (tried once in 2023) returns, plus first-time hood."
      },
      {
        "rank": 16,
        "horse": "Baltic Voyage (GB)",
        "jockey": "Daniel Muscutt",
        "trainer": "Marcus Tregoning",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "93",
        "or": "81",
        "form": "904/4-",
        "sire": "Frankel",
        "dam_sire": "Lope De Vega",
        "stall": 14,
        "weight": "9-5",
        "score": "44.2",
        "model_pct": "2.9%",
        "fair_odds": "35.06",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+0.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "1-10 over 2022 and 2023 for Ralph Beckett, with a soft-ground win over 1m2f, but modest over hurdles in 2024; fourth of eight for new yard in a 1m2f handicap last July was a partial revival but that was his only race last year and he needs to build markedly on it; tongue-tie (worn as a hurdler) returns."
      }
    ]
  },
  {

      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Ended 2025 with an easy 6f novice win here on good ground; game effort to win a 5f handicap at Wolverhampton on her return 18 days ago but she would be no banker to confirm the placings with The Lost Sock on 3lb worse terms."
      },
      {
        "rank": 2,
        "horse": "The Lost Sock",

        "model_pct": "15.2%",
        "fair_odds": "6.59",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-5.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "5f win at Catterick on final 2yo start; flopped when strong favourite at Kempton on seasonal/handicap debut last month (too free over 6f); better effort when third at Wolverhampton 18 days ago (5f), having to wait for a gap to appear but keeping on when in the clear; still has some potential back on turf."
      },
      {
        "rank": 3,
        "horse": "Merlier",

        "trainer": "Archie Watson",
        "ts": "-",
        "rpr": "96",

        "stall": 5,

        "fair_odds": "10.50",
        "best_dec": "8.50",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "He has form figures of 211 but in fields of four, five and three; his ceiling is not easy to establish but there is no doubt he is in much deeper on this turf and handicap debut."
      },
      {
        "rank": 4,
        "horse": "Mo Of Cairo (GB)",

        "trainer": "Kevin Ryan",
        "ts": "77",
        "rpr": "91",
        "or": "84",

        "fair_odds": "13.46",
        "best_dec": "5.50",
        "edge": "-11.5pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won a Beverley maiden (5f, good to firm) in July and went on from there to run a stormer in a 6f nursery at York's Ebor meeting, showing bright speed and headed only late on; that form is rock solid and he looks a key player despite a 3lb rise."
      },
      {
        "rank": 5,
        "horse": "Schrodinger's Cat (GB)",
        "jockey": "Andrew Mullen",
        "trainer": "Grant Tuer",
        "ts": "83",
        "rpr": "94",

        "stall": 8,

        "model_pct": "7.1%",
        "fair_odds": "14.12",
        "best_dec": "11.00",
        "edge": "-2.4pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Seventh time lucky for Harry Charlton when narrowly landing a 5f novice at Redcar 214 days ago; sold for 30,000gns in October; makes his handicap, seasonal and stable debut in a competitive event."
      },
      {
        "rank": 6,
        "horse": "Big Fun (IRE)",
        "jockey": "Oisin McSweeney",
        "trainer": "Kevin Ryan",
        "ts": "82",
        "rpr": "94",
        "or": "82",
        "form": "2217-",

        "fair_odds": "14.28",
        "best_dec": "13.00",
        "edge": "-1.0pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Didn't have to improve to win a four-runner Musselburgh maiden last July (5f, good; at 1-6); creditable seventh in the Super Sprint at Newbury 18 days later; absent since; one of three runners for Kevin Ryan."
      },
      {
        "rank": 7,
        "horse": "Dazzling Haze (GB)",

        "trainer": "Robert Cowell",
        "ts": "81",
        "rpr": "91",

        "stall": 9,

        "fair_odds": "15.86",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+3.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Won two of her four nursery runs for the Crisfords, including over C&D in September (good ground); improvement necessary to overcome this mark but she can't be ruled out on her first run for Robert Cowell."
      },
      {
        "rank": 8,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Maiden winner but unplaced in two nurseries for Andrew Balding; sold for 27,000gns in October; looks up against it on her stable debut."
      },
      {

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two wins as a 2yo, including C&D; slightly disappointing on her seasonal and handicap debut at Wolverhampton last month but it's possible the return to turf will see her in a better light."
      },
      {

        "trainer": "Tim Easterby",
        "ts": "90",
        "rpr": "91",

        "stall": 3,

        "fair_odds": "21.18",
        "best_dec": "29.00",
        "edge": "+0.6pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Raced over 5f only once as a 2yo but it produced his best performance, coming from rear to win a York nursery in October; 5lb higher today but this is set to be strongly run and coming from off the pace might be beneficial; interesting."
      },
      {
        "rank": 11,

        "fair_odds": "22.09",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Doncaster novice winner (5f, good to soft) last July and ran well for second in a soft-ground nursery at Sandown one month later; highly tried since and he has come up short, albeit running a good race when fifth in the Group 2 Flying Childers; drops back into a handicap but he has to concede weight to some promising sprinters."
      },
      {

        "fair_odds": "22.25",
        "best_dec": "19.00",
        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Made all when beating The Lost Sock by a head over C&D last August; came up short in stronger races twice afterwards but there were mitigating factors; one of three runners for Kevin Ryan."
      },

        "rank": 13,

        "edge": "-1.3pp",
        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Two 5f wins on fast turf last summer; finished second at Chester in her hat-trick bid in September and she is only 1lb higher today; stable also runs Go Vince Go who beat this filly at York when she was last seen."
      },

        "rank": 14,

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Of interest on his two best efforts last year, namely a 5f novice win and a good second in a nursery at the Ayr Gold Cup meeting; market useful back from a six-month break."
      }
    ]
  },

        "run_style": "",
        "cd": "",

        "run_style": "",

        "cd": "",

        "cd": "",

      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Improved effort back from five months off when opening his account in a 1m2f Newcastle classified event 37 days ago, his first attempt at this trip; did quite well to get up late on having had to wait for a run and could be on a good mark back in a handicap."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Reeled off a fast-ground hat-trick over this trip last August; also runner-up off 2lb higher at Redcar (1m2f, good to soft) in the autumn but never involved on Doncaster return three weeks ago."

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "Travelled with purpose close to the pace before fading late into fifth over 1m3f at Southwell 16 days ago; today's slightly shorter trip should help and retains potential after only six starts."
      },

        "cd": "",
        "spotlight": "0-5 in maidens at up to 1m4f in Ireland for Dermot Weld; sold for 16,000euros in November; remains unexposed but the betting is perhaps the best guide to expectations on handicap and yard debut after seven months off; drawn widest."
      }
    ]
  },
